name: WAG Chat — Daily Summary (23:00 WIB, all groups)

parameters.query:
SELECT chat_jid, project_name, send_to
FROM wag_groups
WHERE active = true
ORDER BY chat_jid

=SELECT sender_name, message, "timestamp"
FROM wag_messages
WHERE chat_jid = '{{ $json.chat_jid }}'
  AND ("timestamp" AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta') >= date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta')
  AND ("timestamp" AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta') <  date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta') + interval '1 day'
ORDER BY "timestamp" ASC

INSERT INTO wag_summaries (chat_jid, summary_date, message_count, member_count, status, summary_text)
VALUES ($1, (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Jakarta')::date, $2, $3, $4, $5)
ON CONFLICT (chat_jid, summary_date) DO UPDATE SET
  message_count = EXCLUDED.message_count,
  member_count  = EXCLUDED.member_count,
  status        = EXCLUDED.status,
  summary_text  = EXCLUDED.summary_text,
  created_at    = now()
